resposta:
solution: ```class Solution:
    def distanceTraveled(self, mainTank: int, additionalTank: int) -> int:
        distance = 0
        while mainTank > 0:
            consume = min(5, mainTank)
            distance += consume * 10
            mainTank -= consume
            if consume == 5 and additionalTank > 0:
                additionalTank -= 1
                mainTank += 1
        return distance
```
efficiency: HIGH
time complexity: O(mainTank)
space complexity: O(1)
energy implications: LOW
explanation: Simulate fuel consumption in 5-liter chunks; each time 5 liters are used and the auxiliary tank has fuel, transfer 1 liter back. The loop runs at most mainTank times, using constant space.
